stat.strength-explanation: Increases the damage dealt by physical attacks and techniques.
stat.defense-explanation: Reduces the damage taken from physical attacks.
stat.spirit-explanation: Increases the damage dealt by magical techniques and affects maximum MP.
stat.wisdom-explanation: Improves magical hit rate, evasion against magic, and reduces damage taken from magical attacks.
stat.speed-explanation: Determines turn order in battle and improves overall evasion rate.
stat.charisma-explanation: Increases Digimon popularity, lowers shop prices, and allows battling certain Tamers.
stat.fire-explanation: Reduces damage taken from Fire-elemental techniques.
stat.water-explanation: Reduces damage taken from Water-elemental techniques.
stat.ice-explanation: Reduces damage taken from Ice-elemental techniques.
stat.wind-explanation: Reduces damage taken from Wind-elemental techniques.
stat.thunder-explanation: Reduces damage taken from Thunder-elemental techniques.
stat.machine-explanation: Reduces damage taken from Machine-elemental techniques.
stat.dark-explanation: Reduces damage taken from Dark-elemental techniques.
